department: Lipa City Engineering Office External Services

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office External Services
external_services.who_may_avail: Registered property owner/s, duly authorized individuals who shall construct, alter, repair, convert and add any building or structure or any portion thereof within the territorial jurisdiction of Lipa City

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Notarized Affidavit of Consent from the Lot Owner (If not the owner) (1 original, 5 photocopies)

checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective Barangay Halls or Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Barangay Clearance for Building Permit (1 original, 5 photocopies)
Request Letter endorsed by City Administrator’s Office
Valid ID of representative (1 original, 1 photocopy)
Notarized Authorization Letter or SPA (1 original copy)
Authority to Sign/Corporate Secretary’s Affidavit (For corporations)
Application Form for Building Permit (6 original copies)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Building Permits & Inspection Division, Lipa CEO

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Ancillary Permits (Electrical, Mechanical, Sanitary, Electronics) (4 originals each)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Building Permits & Inspection Division, Lipa CEO

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Valid PRC ID and current PTR with specimen signature and seal (6 original)
Design Plans (Architectural, Civil/Structural, Electrical, Mechanical, Sanitary) (6 originals)
Soil Test (for 3 storeys and above) and Structural Analysis (except 1 storey)
Bill of Materials / Cost Estimates and General Specifications (6 originals)
Special Use Permit (for specific projects like communication towers, gas stations, etc.)

steps.client_step: 1. Sign on the Visitor’s Log Book & submit complete set of requirements together with Locational Clearance and Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: Offer Log book, receive endorsement from CPDO, check OR and Locational Clearance, evaluate plans, prepare and review Order of Payment
steps.fees: Refer to NBCP New Schedule of Fees
steps.responsible: Officer of the Day, Admin Aide, Architect II, Engineer III/IV, Building Inspector

steps.client_step: 2. Return to office and inquire on status. If approved, pay required fees; otherwise, get documents for compliance.
steps.agency_action: Sign assessment form and order of payment, direct client to City Treasurer’s Office and BFP
steps.responsible: City Engineer, Officer of the Day

steps.client_step: 3. Return to office to submit complete sets of requirements along with Fire Safety Inspection Certificate and Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: Accept documents, check OR, approve and sign safety certifications, prepare endorsement for final approval
steps.responsible: Admin Aide, Engineer III/IV, Architect II, Building Inspector, City Engineer

steps.client_step: 4. Return for the approved permit number and releasing of copies
steps.agency_action: Record approved permits, assign Permit numbers and release client’s copies

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office External Services
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person/entity occupying a structure with an approved building permit within Lipa City.

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Application for Certificate of Occupancy and Completion (1 original)
Approved Building Permit, Sanitary, Electrical, Mechanical, Electronics Permits (1 photocopy each)
Valid PRC ID and current PTR of professionals (1 original)
Photograph of completed structure (Front, Sides, Rear) (1 original each)
Approved Building Plans and Construction Logbook
Current Tax Declaration and Updated Tax Receipt

steps.client_step: 1. Sign Log Book and submit requirements
steps.agency_action: Assess fees, prepare Certificate, direct to CPDO and BFP

steps.client_step: 2. Submit CPDO/BFP clearances, wait for inspection
steps.agency_action: Schedule and conduct site inspection within 3 working days

steps.client_step: 3. Return to obtain Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: Prepare, review, and approve Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 4. Pay fees and submit Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: Check OR, sign safety certifications, review and release certificate

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office External Services
external_services.who_may_avail: Any entity occupying a structure with mechanical installation in Lipa City.

steps.client_step: 1. Sign Log Book and submit requirements

steps.agency_action: Evaluate plans, advise for compliance or inspection
Conduct inspection, prepare Order of Payment
Check OR, sign and approve Certificate

external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office External Services
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person/entity who shall demolish a structure in Lipa City.

steps.client_step: 1. Sign Log Book and submit requirements

steps.agency_action: Conduct inspection, evaluate report, and assess fees

external_services.service_name: Application for Excavation and Ground Preparation Permit
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Excavation and Ground Preparation Permit
external_services.office: Lipa City Engineering Office External Services
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person/entity excavating within Lipa City.

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Application Form for Excavation & Ground Prep (5 copies)

steps.agency_action: Initial evaluation and scheduling of inspection
Issue Order of Payment and release permit
